title: Charms With Professor Flitwick
prose: Professor Flitwick has to stand on a stack of books to see over his desk, which fools precisely nobody into underestimating him — his Charms lessons move fast, and by the second week you're well past 'Wingardium Leviosa' and onto things that actually spark when you get them wrong.
Word around the common room is that this year's Defence Against the Dark Arts post has gone to {{dada-professor}} — everyone has an opinion already, and nobody's even had a lesson yet.

choices.label: Reserve judgment until you've actually sat through a class.
